## [1.1.0](https://github.com/awinogradov/code-assistants/compare/release-action@v1.0.2...release-action@v1.1.0) (2026-06-04)

## Release Notes

Release notes now format all references (files, commits, issues) as clickable links instead of plain text, making them easier to navigate.

## ✨ What's New

### Standardized reference formatting across all generated output
The release action now formats references consistently throughout generated content. File paths, commit SHAs, issue numbers, and document sections all render as clickable links rather than plain text in backticks. This makes release notes, code reviews, and other automated output more navigable for your team. The formatting follows a canonical standard that ensures every reference is resolvable and helpful.
